threading_policy.batching: single character-asset batch; one generation job is sufficient
threading_policy.canonical_output_policy: Only the final confirmed version may live at project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/character_bai_yi_multi_state_board.png. Retained superseded versions must be moved to project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/history/ with .vNNN suffixes.
threading_policy.emblem_safety: Do not modify or overwrite existing faction emblem files or history files.

jobs.title: 断航故土 白翳多状态角色板
jobs.worker_prompt: Generate the Bai Yi multi-state character board defined in project/severed-homeland/prompts/project-bai-yi-character-image-prompts.json. Preserve all locked references and do not redesign or overwrite existing faction emblems. Write the final confirmed image to project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/character_bai_yi_multi_state_board.png. If retaining intermediates, place them under project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes. Return a compact manifest listing final files, dimensions, history files, and blocked items.
